heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 971h Authorization of appropriations
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), was in the original “section 3(b)(2)(H) of that section” and was translated as reading “section 3(b)(2)(H) of that Act”, meaning , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 971i(b)(2)(H) of this titlePub. L. 96–339

children.text: $5,770,000 for each of fiscal years 2007 and 2008;
$6,058,000 for each of fiscal years 2009 and 2010; and
$6,361,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 and 2013.
$160,000 are authorized for the advisory committee established under and the species working groups established under ; andsection 971b of this titlesection 971b–1 of this title
